/usr/bin/ar qc libepoll_reactor.a CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/Epoller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/EventLoopThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/EventLoopThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/TcpConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/epoll_reactor.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libepoll_reactor.a
